name: podcast-doctrineofdiscovery-v2
description: 11ty site for the Mapping the Doctrine of Discovery Podcast.

scripts.build: npm run clean && eleventy && npm run generate:postbuild
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run check:build && npm run check:feeds && npm run check:assets && npm run check:links
